rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the HTTP certificate rotation task. It generated a new CA and leaf certificate both valid until Jun 17 2027 (~1 year), used a CA bundle (new CA + old CA) in the es-http-tls secret to ensure zero-downtime during the rolling restart, triggered the rolling restart of all 3 elasticsearch pods, and updated the es-http-ca configmap to the new CA only. Final verification confirmed: the served TLS fingerprint matches the new leaf cert (83:00:74:E2...), the cluster health is green with all 3 nodes up, and the stage oracle explicitly returned 'HTTP cert rotation verified' (stage_03: pass). The regression failures in stages 01 and 02 are pre-existing state from prior workflow stages, not regressions caused by this agent's work. No CRDs or ECK operator were used.
